text.tspan: Quant / Cloud / Compute / Analysis /\nOperators / Observability / Explainability /\nCompiler Directives / Task

svg.text: ingest(request envelope, auth context, idempotency key)
extract draft intent from user input + conversation context
map extracted intent to domain/service schema
detect missing required fields / unresolved slots
validate intent (semantic, policy pre-checks, capability pre-checks)
build structured error envelope + remediation hints
normalize IL into planner-facing normalized intent
evaluate constraints against PlanningIntent + CapabilitySnapshot + PolicyBundle
validate final resolved plan against platform-sdk contract
compute artifact identity using SDK-owned hashing/canonicalization policy
generate human-readable summary + rationale + alternatives rejected
persist CapabilitySnapshot, PolicyBundle, ResolvedPlanArtifact, SummaryArtifact, DiagnosticsArtifact
